title: asplenium lepidum subsp. lepidum
intro: Asplenium lepidum subsp. lepidum, also known as the lepidolepidium, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Asplenium lepidum subsp. lepidum include its potential to alleviate coughs, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and grinding the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
